1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }

(End of file - total 9 lines)

state.title: Run test suite to see failures

part.text: The bug is in `math.mjs:2` - the `add` function returns `a - b` (subtraction) instead of `a + b` (addition). The test expects addition behavior.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }
